articles.title: Our Inside Look at the Ultimate Sneaker Archive and World Cup Boot Test Inside New Balance HQ
articles.summary: New Balance is no longer just the king of premium lifestyle runners but now also the absolute epicenter of global soccer and street culture. During an exclusive experience in Boston, the brand opened its doors to us for an immersive, behind-the-scenes look into the future of the beautiful game. Walking through the campus, the sheer scale of the brand’s athletic ambition becomes instantly clear. High-performance engineering and high-fashion aesthetics collide, seeing this world-class setup prove that the brand's current cultural foothold is meticulously calculated.The real magic happens where data meets design. articles.summary: Japanese sporting goods icon MIZUNO has unveiled the MORELIA LS — a lifestyle silhouette that carries the DNA of the MORELIA, one of the brand's most beloved football boot lineages.Built on the foundation of the MORELIA GM IN, an indoor football shoe from the mid-2000s, the MORELIA LS has been reimagined for modern life while preserving the details that made the original iconic: the signature flap tongue, precise stitchwork, and refined heel construction. Built from a tactical blend of synthetic leather overlays and open-weave air mesh underlays, the sleek upper embraces functional minimalism while offering a unique, texture-heavy finish.The defining visual hallmark of this partnership is the subversive transformation of AS

articles.title: The Nike Dunk Low SE "Pink Rise" Lets Riveted Heel Hardware Do the Talking
articles.summary: Name: Nike Dunk Low “Pink Flowers”Colorway: Pink Foam/Pink Rise-Sail-Metallic SilverSKU: IV4726-600MSRP: $130 USDRelease Date: Spring 2026Nike's women's Dunk Low SE "Pink Rise" applies riveted flower bud detailing to the heel of a soft suede upper, pairing customized hardware with a deliberately low-contrast palette.The construction logic here is straightforward and well-executed. The riveted buds at the heel are the shoe's single point of elevation, and the rest of the build exists to support that decision rather than compete with it. A soft suede upper turns down the surface noise considerably compared to a leather or mesh base, giving the hardware somewhere quiet to land. The material choice is not incidental. Suede absorbs light rather than reflecting it, which means the studded detail

articles.title: Centre Extends Footwear QCO Deadline by One Year, Allows Limited Imports for R&D
articles.summary: The Central Government has extended by one year the implementation deadline for the Quality Control Order (QCO) covering footwear made from leather and other materials, while also introducing a special exemption permitting limited imports for research and development (R&D) and other non-commercial purposes.
